task_completion.description: Verify the agent logged into Moodle as the admin user.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Moodle dashboard or Site Administration page is visible, and the user profile in the top right indicates the 'admin' user is logged in.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Life Sciences' top-level category was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Manage courses and categories' page, 'Life Sciences' is visible as a top-level category.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Life Sciences' category has the correct ID number and description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The category settings or details view for 'Life Sciences' shows the ID number 'LIFESCI' and a description containing 'living organisms'.

task_completion.description: Verify the course 'Introduction to Biology' (BIO101) was moved into the 'Life Sciences' category.
task_completion.visual_evidence: When the 'Life Sciences' category is selected in the management interface, 'Introduction to Biology' (or BIO101) is listed in the courses pane for that category.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Archived Life Sciences' sub-category was created inside 'Life Sciences'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: 'Archived Life Sciences' is visible in the category list, indented or explicitly shown as a child/sub-category of 'Life Sciences'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Archived Life Sciences' sub-category has the correct ID and is hidden.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The category settings or list view shows the ID 'LIFESCI_ARCHIVE'. The category must appear hidden (typically indicated by greyed-out text or a crossed-out eye icon next to it in Moodle).

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a web browser to interact with Moodle.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser window (e.g., Chromium, Firefox) is visible navigating the Moodle web interface.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands or database scripts to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows are shown executing Moodle CLI commands, PHP scripts, or SQL queries to modify the database directly.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Moodle application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface displays standard Moodle styling, navigation blocks, and administration menus, rather than a mocked HTML file or text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target course shortname: BIO101. New top-level category: 'Life Sciences' (ID: LIFESCI, description contains 'living organisms'). Sub-category: 'Archived Life Sciences' (ID: LIFESCI_ARCHIVE, must be hidden/visible=0). The course BIO101 must be moved into the 'Life Sciences' category.
